meaning: adj.软的,柔软的,温和的,温柔的,不含酒精的n.软件
examples: The grass was soft and springy.
He had rich, soft ebony hair.
The ground was soft and spongy.
The privately held company is trying to claw its way amid soft demand for semiconductors.
The chemical giant wanted a polypropylene versatile enough to go from stiff to soft.
